ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-01-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100033455) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITY BANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CALVARY SPVI, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SAN DIEGO SUPERIOR COURT. PLAINTIFF TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.'S Motion To Transfer Venue.

Plaintiff Calvary SPVI, LLC's motion to transfer venue is granted. Good cause shown. The case is transferred to San Diego Superior Court. Plaintiff to pay all transfer costs.

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To Jun-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Special Appearance by Roger Jackson, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May-01-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
